task: Parse an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI (e.g., s3://my-bucket/path/to/file.txt) and extract just the bucket name
Create a JSON configuration object for an AWS Lambda function that specifies the runtime as Python 3.11, timeout of 30 seconds, and memory of 256 MB
Write a Python function that takes an AWS IAM role ARN string and returns the role name by extracting it from the ARN format (arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/RoleName)
